behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names adhoc_column_to_sqla, template_processor parameter, and the filter code path; tests check these same names in helpers.py.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug and hints at where to investigate but doesn't give the exact line change.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert specifically that the call with force_type_check=True must have template_processor=template_processor as a keyword arg; an alternative fix that renders the template before the call or uses positional args would fail test_adhoc_column_filter_passes_template_processor.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All f2p tests use file.read_text() with regex/AST inspection (e.g., test_adhoc_column_filter_passes_template_processor checks 'template_processor=template_processor' as a substring); no behavioral execution of the rendering.

test_not_tautological.reason: Stub implementations wouldn't satisfy the requirement that the specific call site includes template_processor=template_processor.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Instruction's requirement (pass template_processor through adhoc filter path) is tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests grouped with section comments for fail-to-pass, pass-to-pass, and CI checks.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names method adhoc_column_to_sqla but not exact file/line; localization remains part of the task.
